DISCOVERY 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF MOUNIR MOUJTAHID'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, FOR ORDER WAIVING OBJECTIONS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $790, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE THE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE LATE COMPLIANCE WITH THE PRIOR COURT ORDER WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 612, NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQ.'S FOR PRODUCTION FOR ORDER WAIVING OBJECTIONS, AND REQ. FOR SANCTIONS - RULING: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MOUNIR MOUJTAHID'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, FOR ORDER WAIVING OBJECTIONS, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE NOTICE WAS INSUFFICIENT PER C.C.P. SECTIONS 1005 AND 1013. THE MOTION WAS FILED ON JULY 31, 2009. THE MOTION MUST BE FILED AND SERVED 16 COURT DAYS, PLUS 5 DAYS, PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE FIRST DAY THIS MOTION COULD HAVE BEEN HEARD IS AUGUST 31, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion For Order Imposing Terminating, Issue And/Or Evidence Sanctions Against Deft Naim Jamali And Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Deft And/Or His Attorney
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joyce Jordan, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Mounir Moujtahid

RULING: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF MOUNIR MOUJTAHID's Motion For Order Imposing Terminating, Issue And/Or Evidence Sanctions Against Defendant Naim Jamali, And Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted as it seeks monetary sanctions. Responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The court finds that the late compliance with the prior court order was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Naim Jamali in the amount of $1,540, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Late opposition has been considered. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Req.'S For Production For Order Waiving Objections, And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Mounir Moujtahid's Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production, For Order Waiving Objections, And Request For Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The motion was filed on July 31, 2009. The motion must be filed and served 16 court days, plus 5 days, prior to the hearing. The first day this motion could have been heard is August 31, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
